title: U.S. Admissions Handbook
description: Comprehensive guide to navigating U.S. university admissions, from choosing schools to submitting applications.

title: University Search Guide
description: How to research and shortlist the right U.S. universities for your academic goals and budget.

title: Personal Statement Workbook
description: A practical workbook with prompts, examples, and exercises to help you write a compelling personal statement.

title: Academic Profile Builder
description: How to build a strong academic profile through extracurriculars, research, leadership, and community engagement.

title: Finding Scholarships for International Students
description: A curated list of scholarships available to Nigerian and African students applying to U.S. institutions.

title: Financial Aid Strategies
description: Strategies to maximise financial aid, including merit awards, need-based aid, and external funding.

title: Student Visa Guide
description: Step-by-step instructions for applying for and obtaining an F-1 student visa to study in the United States.

title: Pre-Departure Checklist
description: Everything you need to prepare before departing Nigeria — documents, finances, packing, and orientation.

title: AI Career Pathways
description: Explore career trajectories in artificial intelligence, from entry-level roles to research and leadership positions.

title: Emerging Technologies Guide
description: An overview of emerging technology fields — AI, quantum computing, biotechnology — and how to enter them.
